name: gcp-create-pubsub-topic
description:
Create a Google Cloud Pub/Sub topic via 'PUT https://pubsub.googleapis.com/v1/projects/{PROJECT_ID}/topics/{TOPIC_NAME}'. Idempotent: if the topic already exists (HTTP 409) the module returns SUCCESS with already_existed=true, so re-running a provisioning workflow is safe. First of the three Phase C provisioning modules — the self-serve automation of docs/gcp-push-setup.md (topic → push subscription → monitoring channel).

This is a WRITE-capable module: it requires the write-tier Google Cloud OAuth consent granted via '/api/gcp/connect-write' (a SEPARATE consent from the read-only '/api/gcp/connect' flow). Set AUTH_HEADER to a vault:// reference under 'oauth/google_cloud_write/...' — the controller resolves + refreshes the token at dispatch time.

AUTH_HEADER.description: vault:// path to the WRITE-tier OAuth access token wrapped in 'Bearer ' (e.g. 'Bearer vault://oauth/google_cloud_write/{user_id}/{provider_key}/access_token'). The controller resolves the vault reference and refreshes the token if expired. Note the '_write' namespace — the read-tier 'oauth/google_cloud/*' token cannot create topics.

PROJECT_ID.description: GCP project id the topic is created in. Must match ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]{4,28}[a-z0-9]$ (validated before the request is built).

TOPIC_NAME.description: Short topic name (NOT the full 'projects/...' path). Must match ^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9._~+%-]{2,254}$ and must not start with 'goog' (validated before the request is built).

setup_instructions.title: Enable the Pub/Sub API
setup_instructions.detail: In https://console.cloud.google.com, enable the Cloud Pub/Sub API for the target project.

setup_instructions.title: Grant write-tier consent
setup_instructions.detail: Complete the WRITE-tier OAuth flow via '/api/gcp/connect-write'. This is a separate consent from the read-only GCP integration and stores tokens under 'oauth/google_cloud_write/{user_id}/{provider_key}/...'.

setup_instructions.title: Configure AUTH_HEADER
setup_instructions.detail: Set AUTH_HEADER to 'Bearer vault://oauth/google_cloud_write/{your_user_id}/{your_provider_key}/access_token'. The controller resolves the vault path + refreshes the token before dispatching. On 401s, re-consent via /api/gcp/connect-write or call refresh_oauth_token(vault_path).

setup_instructions.title: Chain the Phase C provisioning
setup_instructions.detail: Follow with 'GCP: Create Push Subscription' and 'GCP: Create Monitoring Channel' to complete the docs/gcp-push-setup.md provisioning end-to-end. Re-runs are safe — an existing topic returns already_existed=true instead of failing.
